steps.t: Strongboxes can be found throughout the city of Dûn Covád, in the western hills north of Fail-á-Khro. Soltakh has asked you to slip false orders into …
Soltakh is at Fail-á-Khro, south of Dûn Covád and north of Aughaire. Having slipped the false orders into the Angmarim strongboxes, you should return …
